title: The Null Event
summary: Players disappeared from their original world and awoke in a new realm with no memory of their past lives.

title: New Beginnings
summary: With their pasts erased, the players began anew. Homes were built, friendships were formed, and peace flourished across the world.

title: Fragile Harmony
summary: The prosperity of the Garden masked a growing tension. Ambition and desire slowly emerged beneath the surface while an unseen force watched.

title: Paint the World Red
summary: The Entity opened the Nether and delivered a single command to every player: Paint the world red.

title: The Slaughter
summary: The influence of The Entity drove players into violence. Friends and allies turned against one another as bloodshed consumed the world.

title: Revelation of The Entity
summary: The force behind the world's suffering finally revealed itself. It became known by many names, but most simply called it The Entity.

title: The Fracture
summary: The death of a player who opposed The Entity caused the sky itself to tear open.

title: The End Opens
summary: Strongholds awakened across the world as portals to a forgotten realm became active once more.

title: The Dragon Falls
summary: The dragon that guarded the realm was slain by the players, marking one of humanity's greatest victories.

title: The Entity's Displeasure
summary: The Entity reacted with anger after the players survived a fate that was intended to destroy them.
